task_completion.description: Open the Download Manager in the Avare application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Avare application open with the 'Download' or 'Download Manager' interface visible.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the San Francisco VFR Sectional Chart in the download list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sectional' or 'VFR' charts category is expanded in the Download Manager, and the 'San Francisco' chart is visible and selected/highlighted.

task_completion.description: Initiate the download for the San Francisco Sectional Chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A progress bar, active downloading status, or download confirmation prompt specifically for the 'San Francisco' chart.

task_completion.description: Verify that the San Francisco Sectional Chart is successfully installed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'San Francisco' chart in the Download Manager shows a status indicating it is fully downloaded (e.g., a green checkmark, 'Installed' text, or moved to a 'Downloaded' tab).

task_completion.description: Verify the San Francisco chart is visible in the Map view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Map interface of Avare is visible, displaying an aeronautical sectional chart (showing airspace rings, airways, and airport data blocks) over the San Francisco / Bay Area geography.

integrity.description: The agent used the Avare graphical user interface to download the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Avare app menus and buttons, rather than a terminal window using command-line tools like wget or curl to download files.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply search for an image of the chart on the web.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart is viewed within the Avare application interface, not in a web browser (like Chrome) or a generic image viewer.

integrity.description: The map view shows a genuine rendering of the chart within the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Avare UI overlays (such as GPS status, menu buttons at the bottom/top, or scale bars) are visible on top of the aeronautical chart, proving it is loaded in the app's map engine.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target chart is the 'San Francisco' VFR Sectional Chart. In the Avare app, this is found under the 'Sectional' charts category in the Download Manager. A successfully downloaded chart will typically show an 'Installed' status or a green checkmark. The typical size for this chart is around 10MB (minimum 5MB). In the Map view, a sectional chart is characterized by specific aeronautical markings (magenta and blue airspace rings, airport data blocks, airways) over the geographical area of the San Francisco Bay Area.
